Aegis Private Browser

Disposable, isolated browsing environments

|
Stronger protection can reduce site compatibility. Aegis reduces linkability and hides your host IP through an isolated gateway — it does not make you anonymous by default. Review the diagnostics panel before you rely on a session.

Profiles

New Private Session

Configure a fresh, isolated browsing profile. Sensible, safe defaults are pre-selected.

1 Where should it run? Where the browser actually runs. This sets your isolation.

Host mode: the site runs on your real operating system. Only your IP is hidden (via Tor/proxy) and your fingerprint is normalized — you are NOT in an isolated VM. This is weaker protection, not anonymity.

2 How safe do you want to be? One click sets protection + fingerprint. Fine-tune in Advanced.
3 Give it a name (optional) A label just for you. Not sent to any website. Blank = auto-named.
Type Whether anything is kept between sessions.
Browser engine Which engine renders the pages.
Network How this profile reaches the internet.
One bridge line per row. Leave empty to connect to Tor directly.
Stored as a reference in secure storage — the password is never logged.
Enter a proxy host and port.

VPN needs an endpoint and stored credentials, so it is set up through the CLI/config. In host mode, use Tor or a proxy instead.

Fingerprint (override the preset) Each switch overrides the preset for this profile only.

Non-negotiable rules still apply: device APIs stay blocked and WebGPU stays off in Strict/Paranoid.

Configured target values for this profile. Runtime diagnostics distinguish configured, measured and verified values.

Browser —
User-Agent — Representative — the real engine version is used at runtime.
Isolation —
Network —
Protection —
Timezone —
Language —
CPU cores —
WebGL —
WebGPU —
Canvas —
Letterboxing —
Timer precision —
Device APIs blocked —
Media devices limited —
Battery / Sensors off —
Stronger protection can reduce site compatibility. Aegis is not "100% anonymous".
Name Type Network Protection Gateway Public IP Age Size Last run Actions

What websites can see

Configured values are targets. Only measured or verified values came back from the running browser environment.

User-Agentunknown

Preflight checks

  • Select a session to view its preflight checks.

Subsystem details

  • No details.

Advanced

Platform —
Daemon version —
Isolation level unknown

Containment enforcement

Full VM isolation is the secure default. Relaxing it trades protection for the ability to run without a hypervisor.

Daemon: unknown Aegis never claims to make you fully anonymous or undetectable.
